# RFwatch — LLM Discovery File

RFwatch is a desktop application for detecting, analyzing, and visualizing radio-frequency (RF) signals using HackRF One SDR hardware and GNU Radio.

## Core Documents
- README.md: Full project overview, install, usage
- CLAUDE.md: LLM agent instructions (architecture, rules, env vars)
- ARCHITECTURE.md: Detailed architecture and data flow
- CONTRIBUTING.md: Development setup and contribution guide

## Quick Install
```
sudo apt install gnuradio gr-osmosdr hackrf \
  python3-pyside6.qtcore python3-pyside6.qtwidgets \
  python3-pyside6.qtgui python3-pyside6.qtopengl
pip install numpy PySide6 PyQt5 pyqtgraph
python -m ui.app
```

## Key Source Files
- core/detector.py: Binary signal presence detection with hysteresis
- core/segmenter.py: FFT-based frequency segmentation
- core/emitter_tracker.py: Deterministic emitter identity inference
- core/engine_controller.py: State machine and mode lifecycle
- grblocks/flowgraph.py: GNU Radio HackRF flowgraph builder
- ui/main_window.py: PySide6 main window with all controls

## Entry Points
- python -m ui.app # GUI
- python cli/run.py # Headless CLI
